title: Sora 2 AI Olympic Games
about: Sora AI Olympic Games or Sora 2 Olympics refers to a series of AI-generated videos produced with OpenAI's Sora 2 tool that imagines various Olympic events and games, often generated to be as offensive as possible. Some viral examples include a "dishwashing event" and depictions of the "Fat Olympics" and the "Women's Olympics." The AI trend began in early October 2025, shortly after the release of Sora 2, with Instagram user krazy.ai, garnering viral spread that month to sites including X / Twitter and Facebook.
origin:
On October 6th, 2025, Instagram[1] account krazy.ai posted a video generated with Sora 2, imagining dishwashing as an Olympic event in the year 2067. The post gained over 199 million views and 7.4 million likes in four days.

On October 7th, the same Instagram[2] account posted another AI-generated video of a non-existent event, carpet vacuuming. The caption reads, "Women’s Olympics 2067: Who Can Vacuum the Carpet Faster!" The post gained over 25 million views and 400,000 likes in three days.
